business.name: Emergency Plumber B42
business.tagline: Fast Emergency Plumbing, Day or Night

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Arrived within the hour on a Sunday night for a burst pipe. Sorted it quickly and at a fair price. Absolute lifesaver!

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Called at 11pm with no hot water. Engineer was friendly, professional and had us sorted before midnight. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Priya K
sample_reviews.text: Prompt response, honest pricing and tidy work. Will definitely use again for any plumbing issues. Very reliable.

brand.usp: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week across Birmingham and the surrounding areas, we get to you fast when plumbing emergencies can't wait.
brand.about_paragraph: I'm a local emergency plumber based in Great Barr, B42, covering Birmingham and the surrounding areas around the clock. Whether it's a burst pipe at midnight or a boiler failure on a bank holiday, I'm just one call away and aim to be with you within the hour. I take pride in honest pricing, clean work and getting your home back to normal as quickly as possible.
